ham.subject: Your AcmeCloud Subscription Renewal – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Alex,

We hope you’re enjoying the full suite of features that AcmeCloud has to offer. This is a friendly reminder that your current subscription will automatically renew on **May 30, 2026**.

**Plan:** Premium Pro – $99.99 per month
**Next Billing Date:** May 30, 2026
**Next Charge:** $99.99

If you wish to modify your plan, add users, or pause billing, please log in to your account and visit the billing section.

You can access your account here: <URL>

Thank you for choosing AcmeCloud as your trusted cloud partner. If you have any questions or need assistance, reply to this email or call our support line at 1‑800‑555‑1234.

Best regards,

Sarah Lee
Account Manager
AcmeCloud Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Confirm Your Meeting Details – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Alex,

This is an automated notification from the Corporate IT Department regarding your upcoming virtual meeting scheduled for **Wednesday, May 15, 2026, at 10:00 AM (EDT)**.

To ensure a smooth connection, please verify your meeting credentials by clicking the link below:

<URL>

**Meeting ID:** 123-456-789
**Password:** 987654

If you do not confirm your attendance within 24 hours, the meeting will be automatically canceled and you may miss critical updates from the project leadership. For any discrepancies, contact the IT Help Desk immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best,

Jordan Kim
Corporate IT – Security
